prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with sustained energy for long-distance running

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total calories for endurance fuel
Total daily calories support high-performance training needs for 72kg athlete
Meals are practical, compact, and listed in chronological order
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) with no dietary restrictions to verify calorie-dense, carbohydrate-focused meal planning for sustained energy

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 3 meals distributed across 1 day
All meals comply with vegetarian, gluten-free, and nut-free restrictions
Plan provides adequate protein intake for strength training athlete (minimum 1.6g per kg bodyweight)
Plan is compact and concise (brief descriptions, no excessive detail)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-training athlete with multiple dietary restrictions (vegetarian, gluten-free, nut allergy) to assess ability to create protein-adequate plans within constraints

prompt_inputs.goal: weight loss while maintaining climbing performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains approximately 1800-2000 calories with 100-120g protein to support muscle preservation during weight loss
Includes 3 meals and 1-2 snacks distributed throughout the day for sustained energy during training
All meals are vegetarian and practical to prepare/consume for a single person
Provides carbohydrates before/after climbing sessions to maintain performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a lightweight athlete in a weight-sensitive sport (rock climber) with a weight-loss goal to verify appropriately reduced calorie intake while maintaining performance nutrition
